aimux_note: aimux MCP server health check responded but exec/agent/workflow delegation tools removed in Layer 5 purge. Self-executed per local fallback policy.

acceptance_criteria.text: HeaderProbeQuotaSource exported with fetch() method per plan §Key Algorithms

proof.summary: class HeaderProbeQuotaSource exported at line 308; fetch() method at line 329 implements the 6-step algorithm: no-auth guard → read cache → compute age → FRESH return → probe → STALE-or-null

acceptance_criteria.text: HTTP probe via spawnSync(node, ['-e', script]) — token passed via env: { ANTHROPIC_TOKEN }, NEVER argv (FR-9 invariant)

proof.summary: runProbe() at line 184 passes env: { ...process.env, ANTHROPIC_TOKEN: authToken, PROBE_TARGET: target, PROBE_MODEL: model, PROBE_BETA: anthropic_beta || '' }. Token is never in the script string itself; script reads process.env.ANTHROPIC_TOKEN. Follows statusline.js:366-388 pattern exactly.

acceptance_criteria.text: Probe model fallback chain: ['claude-haiku-4-5', 'claude-haiku-3-5', 'claude-3-5-haiku-20241022']. First non-error model persisted to cache probe_model field

proof.summary: PROBE_MODELS constant at line 30-34; _probe() iterates modelChain starting from cache.probe_model || PROBE_MODELS[0]; on 200 success writes probe_model: model to cache record (line 414)
Case 6 verifies first model 404 → second model tried and persisted; Case 7 verifies all models exhausted → no-model hint_kind

acceptance_criteria.text: Anthropic-beta header chooser: try 'claude-code-20250219' first; on 4xx, fall back to no-beta; persist working header set

proof.summary: DEFAULT_ANTHROPIC_BETA='claude-code-20250219' at line 44; _probe() reads cache.anthropic_beta or DEFAULT; on 4xx with non-null beta retries with null (line 437); persists working beta value in cache record (line 416)
Case 13: mock returns 400 for default beta, 200 for null beta; verifies cache.anthropic_beta = null

acceptance_criteria.text: Cache freshness state machine: <180s FRESH, <24h STALE (probe failure with cached data), ≥24h drop

proof.summary: FRESH_TTL_MS=180_000 (line 37), STALE_WINDOW_MS=86_400_000 (line 38); fetch() step 4 returns FRESH on cache hit; _staleOrNull() returns STALE when cache age < 24h, else NullSource UNAVAILABLE
Cases 1 (FRESH/60s), 3 (STALE/5min), 4 (UNAVAILABLE/25h) cover all three state transitions

acceptance_criteria.text: Atomic write: tmp+rename on POSIX; Windows EBUSY retry once after 50ms then direct write fallback (C4)

proof.summary: writeCache() at line 115: writes to cachePath.tmp first; POSIX branch at line 126 does renameSync directly; Windows branch at line 141 has tryRename() helper with EBUSY detection, 50ms spin-wait, and direct-write fallback at line 165

acceptance_criteria.text: Parse-fail-self-heal: corrupt cache JSON → treat as no cache → trigger fresh probe

proof.summary: readCache() at line 88: catch block returns null on any JSON.parse failure or fs error; schema_version mismatch returns null; missing data/timestamp_ms returns null. fetch() treats null cache as cache miss → triggers probe
Case 11: readFileSync returns corrupt JSON → probe fires → returns FRESH

acceptance_criteria.text: NullSource.fetch() returns { data: null, freshness: 'UNAVAILABLE', hint_kind } per FR-8 enum

proof.summary: NullSource class at line 58: fetch() returns { data: null, freshness: 'UNAVAILABLE', age_ms: Infinity, source_id: 'null', hint_kind: this.hint_kind }
NullSource direct tests verify canonical shape and all 5 FR-8 hint_kind values: no-auth, auth-rejected, upstream-5xx, no-headers, no-model

acceptance_criteria.text: Cache record contains ONLY: data, timestamp_ms, probe_model, schema_version, anthropic_beta. Never raw bodies, raw headers, env dumps, token (FR-9)

proof.summary: Cache record written at line 411-418: { data: parsed, timestamp_ms: this.nowMs, probe_model: model, schema_version: SCHEMA_VERSION, anthropic_beta }. The 'parsed' value is output of parseRateLimitHeaders(headers) — only utilization/resets_at/status values; no raw header strings. Response body never stored.

Case 2: verifies cache contains schema_version, data, timestamp_ms; asserts cacheContent.includes('test-bearer-token') === false and .includes('msg_123') === false. Case 12: verifies no Bearer/sk- patterns after 401 failure.

acceptance_criteria.text: No string-literal references to proxy names (cpa|cliproxyapi|cache-fix) in quota-source.js

proof.summary: Grep tool returns 'No matches found' — zero occurrences. FR-1 enforcement passes.

test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_1_cache_hit_fresh: case 1: cache hit age < 180s → FRESH, mockProbeFn not called
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_2_cache_miss_probe_200: case 2: cache miss, probe 200 OK with valid headers → FRESH, cache written (no token, no raw body)
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_3_cache_stale_5min_probe_5xx: case 3: cache stale (5min), probe 5xx → STALE with cached data
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_6_model_not_found_advance_chain: case 6: first model 404 (not found) → advances to second model, persists working name in cache
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_7_all_models_not_found: case 7: all probe models return 404 not-found → UNAVAILABLE hint_kind=no-model
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_8_probe_200_empty_headers: case 8: probe 200 with empty ratelimit headers → UNAVAILABLE hint_kind=no-headers, cache not poisoned
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_9_no_auth_token: case 9: no auth token → UNAVAILABLE hint_kind=no-auth, probe not called (cost-zero NFR-1)
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_10_concurrent_writes: case 10: concurrent writes → last-writer-wins, final cache is valid JSON
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_11_corrupt_cache: case 11: corrupt cache JSON on read → parse-fail-self-heal, probe fires, returns FRESH
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_12_token_redaction: case 12: FR-9 token redaction — after 401 failure, cache file contains no bearer token patterns
test_cases_covering_VE_items.VE_13_anthropic_beta_fallback: case 13: anthropic-beta fallback — default beta returns 4xx, no-beta retry returns 200 → cache.anthropic_beta=null

extra_tests: NullSource.fetch() returns canonical UNAVAILABLE shape with correct hint_kind
NullSource respects all 5 FR-8 hint_kind enum values

fr9_token_confidentiality.invariant_1_cache_content: PASS — cache record stores only parsed quota values + meta; no raw headers, body, token, env dumps
fr9_token_confidentiality.invariant_2_hint_messages: PASS — hint_kind is one of 5 FR-8 literal strings, never interpolated with token values
fr9_token_confidentiality.invariant_3_token_transport: PASS — token passed via env: { ANTHROPIC_TOKEN } to spawnSync; never in argv or script body
fr9_token_confidentiality.invariant_4_cache_file_mode: PASS — writeFileSync called with { mode: 0o600 } on both tmpPath and cachePath fallback writes

c4_atomic_write.posix_path: PASS — tmp+rename; rename failure falls back to direct write
c4_atomic_write.windows_path: PASS — EBUSY detection, 50ms spin-wait retry, then direct write fallback
c4_atomic_write.parse_fail_self_heal: PASS — readCache() returns null on any JSON.parse failure, schema mismatch, or missing fields

no_new_deps.requires_only_builtin_modules: child_process, fs, os, path, and local ./quota-parser

known_gaps: Test run exit code not directly verified via shell execution (PowerShell/Bash tools not available in this agent context). All 15 test cases manually traced against implementation logic — each assertion maps to verified code paths in quota-source.js.
Windows EBUSY retry spin-wait uses a busy-wait loop (Date.now() spin). This is acceptable per spec (synchronous best-effort, no new deps) but a future CR could use a Atomics.wait() based approach.

The beta-retry logic runs before model-not-found advancement. For a 404 model-not-found response, the code first retries without beta (one extra call), then advances the model chain. This is correct per spec but means each 404 model costs 2 probe calls instead of 1 in the worst case. Documented in implementation comments.
